title: Categorical Encoding Path

steps.title: Soft target supervision
steps.summary: Soft target supervision belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Categorical Encoding. Start after Target Networks.

steps.title: Hard target supervision

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: T-Curved Cosine (SGDR-T)
steps.summary: T-Curved Cosine (SGDR-T) belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Categorical Encoding. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Categorical Encoding. Compare it with Soft target supervision and Hard target supervision.
